title: Random Serverside Blocks
description: This mod adds some serverside blocks using polymer
body:
this mod adds random blocks that i wanted to add.

feel free to request blocks that you want as long as they're not too complicated

this mod is completely server side using the polymer framework

fabric only unless someone else want to port it


.
currently adds the following:
- Unrestricted Piston Head
- Unrestricted/Half Beds
- Torch Levers
- Unmeltable Snow Layers
- Unchanging Dirt Path
- Unchanging Grass Block
- Survival Barrier
- Survival Light
- Floating Rails
- Blackstone/Stone Pebble
- Half tall Flowers/grass/fern
- Gelled Water/Lava
   - right click with carrot on a stick to be able to break them
